# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "example/application",
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "echo 'Running post-install commands...'",
            "php -r \"echo 'Executing PHP setup script...'; require_once 'scripts/setup.php';\"",
            "curl -L -o assets/app.zip https://example.com/assets/app.zip",
            "unzip -o assets/app.zip -d public/assets/",
            "chmod -R 755 public/assets/",
            "php artisan config:cache",
            "php artisan route:cache"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "echo 'Running post-update commands...'",
            "php -r \"echo 'Executing PHP update script...'; require_once 'scripts/update.php';\"",
            "curl -L -o assets/updates.zip https://example.com/assets/updates.zip",
            "unzip -o assets/updates.zip -d public/assets/",
            "php artisan config:clear",
            "php artisan cache:clear",
            "php artisan config:cache"
        ]
    }
}
